data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Changes correctly address all acceptance criteria: (1) TableCell align-top→align-middle for consistent row vertical alignment; (2) profile and owner-type pills normalized to h-5 matching Badge height; (3) title column flex container switched to items-center with mt-0.5 nudge removed from chevron button; (4) three regression tests added. All quality gates pass: 0 lint errors, typecheck clean, 2260/2260 tests pass, build succeeds. No security issues or regressions found.
